purpose: Reference list for data-region-id values captured in MTurk study click events and layout_snapshot records.
notes: Every click event records the clicked element plus the current layout_snapshot.
layout_snapshot includes visible elements with data-region-id, their bounding rectangles, and viewport-relative coordinates.
Dynamic region IDs use the patterns shown below, with the visible task/object/option/tooltip value substituted at runtime.

consent.description: Button to accept consent and continue.
Button to decline consent and end the study.

introduction.description: Introduction title and slide count area.
Current slide number and total slides.
Fallback introduction text area when an image is not available.
Button on the final introduction slide to start questions.

attention_check.description: Attention check prompt and navigation area.
Question progress text for the attention check.
Instruction text for open-ended attention checks.
Next button for an attention check.
Answer area for the attention check.

main_study_question.description: Full main question screen. This is represented by the study-interaction-page layout.
Question text and Next button panel.
Question text block containing progress, scenario, prompt, and selected-answer feedback.
Question number and total question count.
Scenario text shown above the prompt when applicable.
Main prompt asking the participant where to click.
Feedback text describing the participant's current selected region.
Outer area containing the simulated tablet/helper dashboard.
Next button after choosing an answer.

helper_dashboard.description: Individual dropdown option for a selected, completed, current, or future activity.
Volume control for the simulated VR user's current view.
Region showing what the headset user is currently seeing.
Video overlay shown inside the simulated VR user's current view after a send-video action.
Individual object button used to point to or highlight a virtual object.
Remove highlight / clear object annotation button.
Physical action and controller movement video player region.
Button that sends the physical movement/controller guidance video to the headset user.
Button that removes the sent physical movement/controller guidance video.
3D controller model area showing the relevant controller button.
Dropdown selecting which task object the controller guidance describes.
Video showing how the selected activity is performed in the virtual world.
Info tooltip button for a dashboard section.
Visible tooltip text for a dashboard section.
A click inside the dashboard that did not hit a more specific tracked element.

completion.description: Debug-mode notice shown when debug mode is enabled.
Instruction explaining that responses must be saved before HIT submission.
Instruction telling workers to keep the MTurk page open.
Link/button to open the Qualtrics exit survey.
Disabled status button when Qualtrics URL is missing.
Input where the worker enters the Qualtrics completion code.
Button that submits the MTurk HIT after code validation.
Displayed completion-code or submit URL error.

terminal_access_states.description: Full screen shown when MTurk parameters are required but missing.
Full screen shown when worker is previewing the HIT before accepting.
